nodes.label: HITL DynamoDB Checkpointer Invariant
nodes.rationale: Without a persistent DynamoDB checkpointer, LangGraph interrupt() cannot persist state and the workflow cannot resume after human approval. Compiler auto-injects DynamoDBSaver when HITL nodes are present; graphs without HITL must omit the checkpointer to avoid unnecessary DynamoDB calls.

nodes.label: Athena Parameterization Security Invariant
nodes.rationale: SQL injection prevention: only ? positional placeholders via Athena ExecutionParameters are allowed. String-formatted queries are explicitly prohibited by the compiler.

nodes.label: Condition Expression Language Invariant
nodes.rationale: eval()-based Python is prohibited to prevent arbitrary code execution from the canvas. Only jmespath (read-only traversal) and cel (sandboxed CEL) are supported.

nodes.label: Lazy lru_cache Secrets Fetching Invariant
nodes.rationale: Secrets fetched lazily via functools.lru_cache, never at module import time. Avoids Secrets Manager API calls on every Lambda cold start; cache persists across warm invocations.

nodes.label: OAuth2 Token Near-Expiry Cache Invariant
nodes.rationale: OAuth2 tokens for tool_http cached via lru_cache keyed on expiry, refreshed 60 seconds before expiry. Token never stored in state or logs.

nodes.label: Per-Tool Lambda + IAM Role Invariant
nodes.rationale: Each tool node generates exactly one Lambda with its own least-privilege IAM role. No shared execution roles across tools or agents. No wildcard resource ARNs.

nodes.label: Bedrock-Only LLM for v1
nodes.rationale: Amazon Bedrock is the sole LLM provider in v1. Architecture is designed to be provider-agnostic via LangChain abstractions to allow future extensibility to OpenAI, Vertex AI, etc.

nodes.label: inference_profile_arn Precedence over model_id
nodes.rationale: When inference_profile_arn is set on agent or tool_bedrock nodes, it takes precedence over model_id. Required for cross-region inference when model is unavailable in deployment region.

nodes.label: Loop Node Send API Compilation Invariant
nodes.rationale: Loop node compiles to LangGraph Send API fan-out/fan-in. item and results ports are two separate subgraph edges; a downstream node cannot be wired to both simultaneously.
nodes.norm_label: loop node send api compilation invariant

nodes.label: Single-Tenant Design Decision
nodes.rationale: No multi-workspace, no RBAC in v1. Simplifies auth, data isolation, and deployment model.

nodes.label: Cache Node DynamoDB-Only in v1
nodes.rationale: ElastiCache (Redis) deferred from v1 due to added VPC infrastructure complexity. DynamoDB used as sole cache backend.

nodes.label: Streaming Lambda Handler
nodes.rationale: When agent.streaming=true, a streaming_lambda_handler is generated alongside the synchronous lambda_handler. Requires FunctionResponseTypes=[STREAMRESPONSE] in Terraform and WebSocket or chunked transfer in API Gateway.

nodes.label: Canvas Autosave to DynamoDB
nodes.rationale: Internal graph state autosaved every 10 seconds with optimistic updates to DynamoDB, preventing data loss during canvas editing sessions.

nodes.label: Declarative Migrator Chain (project.json)
nodes.rationale: Schema migrations applied as a chain of declarative migrators. Never modify existing migrators, only add new ones. Platform supports last 2 major versions.
